title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.718 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.16920, with ECB rate at 2% and Fed at 3.75% — 175bp spread continues to weigh on EUR/USD; rate divergence favours USD.

title: CFTC — JPY
text: JPY net short positioning at 60,210 contracts, 34.8% long — institutional bearishness may drive further JPY weakness.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.2 signals low volatility — risk-on environment, but watch for potential shifts with WTI oil price surging 8.63%.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD trading below 0.70330, with RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported, but cross-asset flows may overwhelm carry.
